description.en: Returns anIntegerrepresenting the number of elements in the session history, including the currently loaded page. For example, for a page loaded in a new tab this property returns1.

excerpt.es: Returns anIntegerrepresenting the number of elements in the session history, including the currently loaded page. For example, for a page loaded in a new tab this property returns1.
